name: Grilled Dove
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the butter and saute the garlic until it is translucent. Allow to cool.
2. Season the breasts with salt and pepper.
3. Place the breasts on the hot grill and brush them with the garlic butter. Ensure the breasts are well coated with butter, as dove breasts are very lean.
4. Baste every minute or so.
5. Turn the breasts after 3 to 5 minutes and continue grilling and basting for another 1 to 2 minutes.
This is a very simple and delicious recipe.
